text: Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You’ve been approved as a member. Start by introducing yourself in #introductions.
Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You’ve been added as a moderator. Please review the moderator guidelines in #staff-resources.
Welcome, guide_sam! You’re now an event helper. Check out the #events channel for upcoming shifts and resources.
Glad to have you, mentor_lina! You’ve joined as a mentor. Please visit #mentor-lounge for resources and orientation details.
